executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Generate and execute tests for all Test cases (TC001, TC002, TC003, TC004, TC005, TC006). 
STRICT RULE 1: The test execution sandbox does NOT have the `websockets` library installed. DO NOT write `import websockets`, `import websocket` or any code that tries to connect to the WebSocket endpoints. Just test the standard REST HTTP endpoints!
STRICT RULE 2: Read the provided API specification strictly (`/api/sessions` returns 201 not 200). `chairman_token` from TC001 should be used for Authorization header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. TC004 DELETE `/api/sessions/{session_id}` ends the session, do this LAST.
STRICT RULE 3: TC004 expects 403 or 404 after the session ends explicitly because closed sessions are invalid. Wait times might be needed for `/api/health` and `/api/voices`.
Do not verify WebSockets anywhere. Verify HTTP properties heavily.
